ocr_findings.description: Furigana シージーエム above CGM is captured as a separate line '### 試験にはコレが出る！' header area; however in OCR it appears as a standalone line 'シージーエム' before the CGM paragraph, which is acceptable.
The tip box header '試験にはコレが出る！' — image shows stylized 'コレ'; OCR renders as 'コレ' correctly on this page (consistent with page_117 where it failed, but here it is correct).

reviewer_notes: Page covers フリーミアム, 試験tip box, EC広告, and CGM sections. All prose accurately transcribed. 'コレ' correctly rendered here (contrast with page_117 misread). フリーミアム definition and CGM explanation fully intact. No high or med issues.
